headline: Intuit Expands QuickBooks Into AI Workforce And 401(k) Platform
summary: Intuit (NasdaqGS:INTU) has launched QuickBooks Workforce, a new AI-powered human capital management platform for small and mid-sized businesses. The company has also partnered with Vestwell to embed 401(k) retirement savings solutions directly into the QuickBooks ecosystem. Together, these moves expand Intuit’s reach beyond accounting and tax software into more comprehensive workforce and benefits management. For investors watching how software providers respond to small business needs,...
